description: Non-overlapping fcc Ni support rows for material-family-aware Lupine Distill canaries. The held-out evaluation fixture remains ni-fcc-eam-home-turf-v1.

metadata.reference_model_scope: support-only EAM calibration rows; not a sealed evaluation fixture

non_overlap.rule: distinct structure_id plus distinct scale/seed/strain choices from the sealed evaluation fixture
